EmailTemplate.name: Orphan Correlation Approval Request
EmailTemplate.Description: Sent to the line manager of a matched identity when an admin requests their approval before correlating an orphan account.
EmailTemplate.Subject: Action Required: Orphan Account Correlation Approval for ${orcIdentityDisplay}

EmailTemplate.name: Orphan Correlation Result
EmailTemplate.Description: Sent to the requesting admin after the manager approves or rejects an orphan account correlation request.
EmailTemplate.Subject: Orphan Correlation ${decision}: ${nativeIdentity} -- ${identityDisplayName}
